auth.loginHint: Cart, wishlist, favorites, checkout, and payment actions require a customer account.
auth.registerHint: Register before using cart, favorites, wishlist, checkout, and payment features.
auth.name: Name
auth.requiredNotice: Please login or register before continuing.
auth.cartRequired: Please login or register before adding products to cart.
auth.wishlistRequired: Please login or register before adding products to wishlist.
auth.checkoutRequired: Please login or register before checkout or payment.

shop.heroTitle: Discover products built for daily use.
shop.heroText: Browse fresh inventory from your Laravel backend with instant search, filters, and a synced cart.
shop.heroSlideTwoTitle: Upgrade your style with new-season essentials.
shop.heroSlideTwoText: Explore apparel, bags, electronics, and home goods in one fast storefront.
shop.heroSlideThreeTitle: Save favorites, manage cart, and pay from your account.
shop.heroSlideThreeText: Customer actions stay protected until login or registration, keeping your store workflow clean.
shop.noProductsText: Check your backend products endpoint or clear the selected filters.

cart.title: Shopping Cart
cart.emptyText: Add a product from the catalog to start a checkout.

footer.description: A modern Vue and Laravel commerce experience with synced products, protected cart actions, wishlist, and checkout.
